0.title: Not just a simple laminate
0.quote:
Is it necessary to damage teeth worth over $100k just to look pretty?
Blanche started from that question.
Maximum beauty with minimal intervention.
That is the value Blanche pursues.

1.title:
We communicate kindly
and listen carefully
1.quote:
Dental treatment is never an easy process.

At Blanche, we make sure to repeat all explanations at least four times.
We constantly check for any discomfort
and will continue to improve.

2.title:
We constantly invest
for the best environment
2.quote:
While skill is important in dental treatment,
the environment and equipment are equally important.
We constantly invest to treat without fear and pain.

3.title:
If we can't do it,
no one can
3.quote:
Trained at Seoul National University and Columbia & UCLA Dental Hospitals.

We are confident that Blanche's treatment, equipment, and medical staff are world-class.

aboutHistory.title:
Built upon 11 years of mastery,
Blanche Dental Clinic continues to evolve

description: Relocated to 'B722 Building', Nonhyeon Landmark (Grand Open)
Established high-end treatment environment & university hospital-level digital equipment
Built cooperative system of specialists by field
Strengthened medical tourism system for Global K-Medical Hub leap
Selected among Top 100 Doctors in Korea 'Implant Division'
Appointed Clinical Advisor for Straumann & Osstem Implants
Dental Advisor for SBS 'Doctor O's Clinic', YouTube 'Doctor Friends'
Advanced in-house treatment system to increase customer satisfaction
Introduced 1:1 responsible care and dedicated attending physician system
Established in-house dental lab 'Blanche Lab' & dedicated lab team
Established Blanche's unique aesthetic prosthetic design protocol
Accumulated clinical data for no-prep laminates and implants
*A total of 11 years of clinical research and data accumulation since before Seoul Haru Dental Clinic

aboutTech.title:
The only smile of its kind in the world,
custom-designed for you 
at our exclusive in-house Blanche Lab

0.title: 1:1 Custom Design
0.description: We analyze your face shape, lip line, skin tone, and gum line to design the most natural tooth. It's a custom prosthesis just for you, not a ready-made product from a factory.

1.title: Replicating Natural Teeth
1.description: A natural tooth is not just one color. Through dozens of ceramic layerings, we replicate the transparency for light transmission and subtle color tones.

2.title: Real-time Communication
2.description: Our resident lab team participates in treatments. Since the medical staff and lab technicians communicate and modify instantly, more precise and faster results are possible compared to external labs.

3.title: Premium Materials and Equipment
3.description: We use verified top-grade zirconia & ceramic materials, and ultra-precise 3D digital scanners. We create prosthetics that are aesthetically beautiful and functionally long-lasting.

aboutEquipment.title:
Equipped with university hospital-grade tech,
we ensure more precise 
and exceptionally safe care

0.description: Scans the mouth digitally without uncomfortable rubber impression materials. Precise to over 1M points/sec, enabling flawless prosthetic design.

1.description: Identifies gum bone condition and nerve position in 0.1mm units. Low-dose tech minimizes radiation exposure while establishing safe implant/orthodontic plans.

2.description: Uses water and laser instead of drill noise and vibration to treat gums. Less pain and bleeding for faster recovery.

3.subText: Replicates the transparency of natural teeth exactly
3.description: Produces ceramic prosthetics using equipment from Ivoclar, a global dental material company. Bakes at a constant temperature/pressure for a color and transparency hard to distinguish from natural teeth.

4.subText: Carves precisely down to the micro unit
4.description: Precisely processes zirconia based on digital design data. Produces prosthetics that fit the teeth and gum line perfectly.

5.subText: Minimizes the pain of anesthesia injections
5.description: Injects anesthetic fluid at a constant speed and pressure, reducing stinging pain.

6.subText: Thorough sterilization system with no cross-infection worries
6.description: All instruments undergo ultra-high pressure sterilization. We strictly adhere to the 1-instrument-per-person rule, prioritizing patient safety.

aboutFacility.title:
A private and tranquil sanctuary 
where treatment transforms into pure relaxation
aboutFacility.description:
From a waiting area that feels like a luxury lounge 
to fully isolated private treatment rooms,
experience exceptional care in a premium space

0.title: Hotel-style Lounge
0.description: We have prepared a hotel-style lounge space so even your waiting time is comfortable. Warm lighting and cozy furniture welcome our patients.

1.title: 1:1 Private Treatment Rooms
1.description: All treatments are conducted 1:1 in isolated private rooms so you can receive care comfortably without worrying about others' gazes.

2.title: Digital Diagnosis Center
2.description: Precise and safe checkups are conducted in a center equipped with university hospital-level digital diagnostic equipment.

casesReviews.title:
Authentic reviews from guests
who experienced Blanche

0.name: Kim Ji*
0.content: Diagnosed with 4 cavities elsewhere, but after examination at Blanche, only 2 were treated and 2 observed. Truly conscientious like on YouTube, valuing natural teeth. Will entrust my teeth to Blanche. Thank you Director ♡

1.name: Sung Min*
1.content: Chose here because the head director operates directly. Many hospitals change doctors, which made me anxious. Thank you for treating me carefully without pain. Highly recommend to friends and family.

2.name: Ji Soo*
2.content: Born missing a tooth (haha). Found Dr. Kim Tae-Hyung while searching for an implant ♡ (No secret he's handsomer in person). Implant took just 5 minutes! Removed stitches today and it healed nicely. Will bring my mother too! Director is the best, clinic interior is so pretty.

3.name: Moon Jun*
3.content: Got laminates elsewhere but didn't consider tooth color, so top and bottom colors were too different and looked artificial. Came for a revision. The color came out beautifully, very satisfied.

4.name: Park Mi*
4.content: Hesitated due to hearing about laminate side effects. Unlike what I saw online, there was almost no tooth reduction and detailed explanations even for a layperson. The whitening nurse was so kind. The director quickly understood what I wanted and went with minimal (no) prep. Thank you!

5.name: Park Sun*
5.content: Whitening was always a concern due to frequent coffee drinking. Heard laminates are possible with almost no tooth reduction. It was done meticulously and beautifully without looking artificial.

6.name: Yoo Seung*
6.content: Always bothered by uneven bottom teeth compared to top :) Writing this review with great satisfaction as they carefully checked color and shape. Confidence boosted (haha). Thank you Blanche!

7.name: Han Ye*
7.content: Came after watching the director's YouTube. Delayed implant out of fear, but he explained in detail and operated painlessly. Only meant to consult but everyone was so kind I got surgery the same day. Relieved I can come without worries now.

8.name: Lee Hye*
8.content: Came to change old amalgam to tooth color. Found a cavity via X-ray but treated painlessly. Manager, staff, and director were so kind. ♡ Clean and neat tooth color amalgam replacement >_<

9.name: Lee Kyung*
9.content: Visited because another clinic couldn't fix my jaw bite. Think it'll improve with regular care. Will sleep comfortably thanks to you. Thank you~ ♡ Fighting!!

10.name: Seo Chae*
10.content: First visit today. Great facilities and trendy interior made me happy immediately. Kind hygienist, director, and manager made treatment pleasant. Thank you for the detailed X-ray and checkups. Receptionists were helpful too. May Blanche prosper~ Fighting~

laminate.title: No-Prep Laminate | Blanche Dental Clinic
laminate.description: Blanche Dental Clinic's no-prep laminate preserves your natural teeth while perfecting an elegantly natural smile. It is an innovative aesthetic treatment that refines your teeth with zero damage.

meta.title: Blanche Laminate | Blanche Dental Clinic - No-Prep Laminate
meta.description: Blanche Laminate perfects your smile naturally by preserving your natural teeth. With meticulous craftsmanship from our in-house lab and an industry-leading 10-year warranty, we promise a healthy smile for decades.

hero.subtitle: No-Prep Laminate
hero.title:
Preserving your teeth
to complete a flawless smile
hero.description: Achieve a beautifully aligned smile without sacrificing your natural teeth.

what.title: What is No-Prep Laminate?
what.description: An aesthetic dental treatment improving color, shape, and size by attaching ultra-thin ceramic veneers without grinding natural teeth.

textGroup.thirdText:
A method to transform
your front teeth without prep.

However, minimal reshaping
may be needed occasionally.

highlight.title:

faq.title: FAQ
faq.mainTitle:
Everything you wonder
about laminates, answered clearly

items.question:
How is Blanche different
from general laminates?
items.answer: answer_rich_handled_in_component
items.answer_p1: Blanche is not just a prosthetic that covers your teeth; it is a customized design that brings out your unique beauty.
items.answer_p2: At Blanche, an expert ceramist handles the entire process directly, from consultation to crafting and final attachment.

items.question:
Since it's thin, doesn't it break easily?
How long can it last?
items.answer: Although Blanche laminates are ultra-thin, we use high-strength ceramics that offer outstanding durability. With proper care and regular checkups, they can last over 10 years, and there are absolutely no issues with daily eating.

items.question:
Won't my gums swell
or smell after the procedure?
items.answer: Blanche laminates are performed with zero or absolute minimal grinding, so gum irritation is virtually nonexistent. In addition, precise custom crafting optimizes the contact surface with the gums, leaving almost no side effects.

items.question:
Can I replace laminates done
elsewhere with Blanche?
items.answer: Yes, it is possible. After safely removing the existing laminates, we can replace them with Blanche laminates. We will first check your current condition through a consultation and propose the most optimal replacement plan.

items.question:
How do I care for them
after the procedure?
items.answer: Standard brushing and flossing are entirely sufficient. However, we recommend avoiding chewing on extremely hard foods or ice, and visiting for regular checkups.

items.question:
How long does the
crafting process take?
items.answer: To ensure hyper-precise custom crafting, Blanche laminates take about 2-3 weeks. Including pre-procedure consultation and design, the total period requires around 3-4 weeks.

ctaSection.label: Book a Consultation
ctaSection.title:
A smile for a lifetime,
crafted by Blanche
ctaSection.description:

We thoroughly analyze your condition

hero.subtitle: Secretly seamless, beautifully flawless. Blanche Clear Aligners.

what.description: A state-of-the-art orthodontic treatment that uses virtually invisible clear aligners to perfect your smile, minimizing pain and discomfort for a seamless experience.

items.question: Is orthodontic treatment very painful?
items.answer: Say goodbye to the pain of poking wires. You may feel a tight sensation for 2-3 days after changing to a new aligner, which is a positive sign that your teeth are shifting correctly into their planned positions. Blanche meticulously manages any discomfort by utilizing advanced low-friction self-ligating technology to ensure a smoother transition.

items.question: Should I choose laminates or orthodontics?
items.answer: If you want to change the shape of teeth that are broken or discolored, 'Blanche Laminate' is effective. If you want to correct crooked alignment, 'Invisalign (Orthodontics)' is the answer. As we provide both solutions, we offer an unbiased, optimal recommendation tailored to your best interest.

items.question: How many hours a day should I wear the aligners?
items.answer: Teeth constantly try to return to their original positions. You must wear them at all times, including during sleep—excluding meals and brushing—so the cellular movement continues as planned. The longer they are left out, the longer your treatment period may become.

items.question: Will it affect my pronunciation and disrupt my daily life?
items.answer: You might find pronunciation slightly awkward initially, but your tongue naturally adapts within 2-3 days. In fact, professionals who rely on clear articulation—such as announcers and flight attendants—comfortably wear them at work without any disruption to their daily lives.

items.question: How long does orthodontic treatment take?
items.answer: While it depends on your dental condition, partial orthodontics for front teeth requires only 3-6 months. Comprehensive orthodontics averages 1.5 to 2 years. Blanche Dental Clinic utilizes the advanced '2nd Generation Clippy-C' system, reducing friction that hiders tooth movement, which shortens the duration by 2-6 months compared to standard treatments.

items.question: Why do costs vary between clinics?
items.answer: Orthodontics is a highly complex treatment that structurally balances the TMJ and your entire facial profile, not just straightening teeth. At Blanche, a specialist with 20 years of experience and over 10,000 clinical cases personally oversees your care, utilizing the iTero 3D scanner and 100% genuine system. Getting it impeccably right the first time is the most economical choice.

blanche_ms.name: Chief Director Kim Tae-Hyung
blanche_ms.description: Hello. I am Kim Tae-Hyung, a dedicated dentist directing Blanche Dental Clinic in Nonhyeon, Seoul. A graduate of Seoul National University College of Dentistry, I craft brilliantly natural smiles and elevate your confidence through Blanche, implants, and meticulous orthodontics.

faq.mainTitle:
All your questions about
Sleep Dentistry,
answered by Blanche.

q1.question: Is there any preparation required for sleep dentistry?
q1.questionMobile:
Is there any preparation required
for sleep dentistry?
q1.answer: We provide individual instructions, but generally, a 6-hour fast is required before treatment. Please wear comfortable clothing. Since drowsiness may persist, we advise against driving alone and recommend bringing a guardian.

q2.question: Is sleep dentistry hazardous? Is it different from general anesthesia?
q2.questionMobile:
Is sleep dentistry hazardous?
Is it different from general anesthesia?
q2.answer: No, it is very safe and different. Blanche utilizes 'Conscious Sedation', allowing spontaneous breathing and responsiveness. It puts significantly less strain on the body than general anesthesia with much faster recovery. Our staff continuously monitors your vitals.

q3.question: Can I wake up during the treatment?
q3.questionMobile:
Can I wake up
during the treatment?
q3.answer: Consciousness may briefly return depending on your reaction to the medication. If this happens, our medical staff will immediately and safely adjust the dosage to return you to a comfortable sedated state, so there is no need to worry.

q4.question: Will I feel zero pain during sleep dentistry?
q4.questionMobile:
Will I feel zero pain
during sleep dentistry?
q4.answer: You will feel almost no pain during the procedure. We use a combination of conscious sedation and local anesthesia to minimize discomfort. Some pain may occur after the anesthesia wears off, which can be managed with prescribed medication and rest.

q5.question: Are there any side effects after sleep dentistry?
q5.questionMobile:
Are there any side effects
after sleep dentistry?
q5.answer: Temporary dizziness, drowsiness, or nausea may occur immediately after the procedure but typically subside within a few hours. For your safety, please avoid driving, operating machinery, or making important decisions on the day of the procedure.

q6.question: Are the medications used safe?
q6.answer: Yes, Midazolam and Ketamine are clinically proven and highly safe sedatives. Blanche Dental Clinic monitors vital signs (oxygen saturation, heart rate, and blood pressure) in real-time before, during, and after the treatment.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.mainTitle:
Things you wonder
before sleep care,
Blanche answers them

items.question: Is there any preparation required for sleep dentistry?
items.answer: Usually, fasting for 6 hours before treatment is required. Wear comfortable clothing. Because drowsiness may persist, avoid driving alone and come with a guardian.

items.question: Is sleep dentistry different from general anesthesia? Isn't it dangerous?
items.answer: Yes, it is different. Blanche uses 'conscious sedation' where you can breathe independently and respond to stimuli. It carries significantly less physical burden than general anesthesia and assures fast recovery.

items.question: Can I wake up during the treatment?
items.answer: Consciousness may briefly return depending on your reaction to the medication. If so, medical staff will safely adjust the dosage to return you to a comfortable state, so there's no need to worry.

items.question: Do I feel absolutely no pain during sleep dentistry?
items.answer: You will barely feel any pain. We combine conscious sedation with local anesthesia to minimize pain. Some pain may occur after waking up, which is manageable with prescribed medication.

items.question: Are there side effects after sleep dentistry?
items.answer: Temporary dizziness, drowsiness, or nausea may occur right after, but naturally disappear within a few hours. For safety, avoid driving or operating machinery on the day of surgery.

items.question: Are the medications used safe?
items.answer: The sedatives Midazolam and Ketamine are proven safe. Blanche Dental Clinic monitors vital signs (oxygen, heart rate, blood pressure) in real-time and takes appropriate safety measures when necessary.

steps.title: Precise Diagnosis & Consultation
steps.description: Analyzing bone precisely with 3D CT and scanners, and establishing a 1:1 tailored plan considering your health.

steps.title: 1st Surgery (Placement)
steps.description: Placing the artificial root precisely at the planned location. Required bone grafting is done concurrently.

steps.title: Osseointegration & Healing
steps.description: The period where the implant firmly bonds with the jawbone. Depending on the individual, it takes about 2 to 6 months.

steps.title: 2nd Surgery & Prosthetics
steps.description: Refining the gums, connecting the abutment, and attaching the final crown crafted to harmonize with surrounding teeth.

steps.title: Regular Checkups & Care
steps.description: Meticulous aftercare is essential for semi-permanent use. Regular scaling and exams prevent peri-implantitis.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.mainTitle:
Things you wonder
before implant consults,
Blanche answers them

items.question: Is implant surgery painful?
items.answer:
The surgery is performed under local anesthesia, so you will barely feel any pain.
Some discomfort may occur as the anesthesia wears off,
but it is fully manageable with prescribed painkillers.
Most return to daily life within 1-2 days.

items.question: How long do implants last?
items.answer:
With proper care, they can be used semi-permanently.
The lifespan depends on oral hygiene, overall health, and regular checkups.
Regular scaling and exams are essential to prevent peri-implantitis.

items.question: How many implants can I get?
items.answer:
Depending on bone condition, you can get up to 28.
Applicable to various cases from single to full tooth loss.
For edentulous patients, the All-on-4 or All-on-6 methods
can restore the entire dentition with fewer implants.

items.question: How much do implants cost?
items.answer:
It varies depending on materials, surgical complexity, and the doctor's experience.
Seniors over 65 can receive health benefits in Korea.
Exact costs will be guided through consultation.

items.question: Should I quit smoking before getting implants?
items.answer:
Yes, quitting is strongly recommended.
Smoking decreases blood flow to gums and bone, slowing recovery
and increasing the risk of peri-implantitis.
Maintaining a smoke-free state is crucial to success.

items.question: What is peri-implantitis?
items.answer:
It is an inflammatory disease in the gums and bone around the implant.
It can occur if oral hygiene is neglected,
and if untreated, bone loss can cause the implant to fall out.
Regular checkups and hygiene care are essential for prevention.

hero.title: Teeth Whitening
hero.subtitle:
Restoring Pure Radiance,
Blanche Teeth Whitening

processIntro.title: What is Teeth Whitening?
processIntro.subtitle:
A treatment that erases stains
and restores true transparency.
processIntro.description:
Our teeth naturally discolor over time as pigments from coffee, tea, and food seep into microscopic pores (dentinal tubules) on the enamel surface. Aging can also cause the inner dentin layer to darken.

At Blanche Dental Clinic, our customized whitening treatment utilizes specialized agents that trigger an oxygenating action. This selectively breaks down embedded organic stains without compromising the tooth's structural integrity. By enhancing light transmittance, we restore a pristine, luminous shade from within.

process.label: Whitening Procedure
process.title:
Blanche's meticulous approach
to diagnosis and treatment

steps.title: Precision Diagnosis & Shade Check
steps.description: We evaluate your current tooth condition and establish a target shade, predicting the optimal brightness achievable post-treatment.

steps.title: Surface Polishing & Scaling
steps.description: To ensure the whitening agent is evenly applied and optimally absorbed, we meticulously remove plaque and tartar beforehand.

steps.title: Gum Protection Barrier
steps.description: We carefully apply a protective barrier to shield your gums from the high-concentration whitening agent, ensuring absolute comfort and safety.

steps.title: Whitening Application & Light Activation
steps.description: The whitening gel is applied and activated using a specialized light to break down stains. (This process is repeated 2–3 times, depending on your needs.)

steps.title: Final Review & Completion
steps.description: We assess the beautiful change in your tooth shade and check for any temporary sensitivity to ensure a perfect, comfortable finish.

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title:
Everything you wonder
before your whitening consultation,
answered by Blanche

items.question:
How long do the 
whitening effects last?
items.answer: While it varies depending on individual dietary habits and care, results typically last from 6 months to a year. Reducing the intake of stain-causing foods and maintaining meticulous oral hygiene will extend this duration.

items.question:
Will my teeth turn 
yellow again after treatment?
items.answer: Because teeth are living tissues, their color may gradually revert over time. However, they will not become as dark as they were prior to the treatment, and you can easily maintain their brightness with routine touch-ups.

items.question:
How many sessions 
are required?
items.answer: At Blanche Dental Clinic, you can achieve noticeable results in just one visit consisting of 2-3 consecutive applications. If you desire an even brighter shade or have severe staining, we may recommend additional sessions spaced a week apart.

items.question:
Are there cases where 
whitening is ineffective?
items.answer:
In the following cases, alternative treatments may be necessary instead of conventional whitening:
- Extremely thin enamel
- Teeth that have undergone root canal therapy
- Teeth with resin restorations or prostheticsAt Blanche, we conduct a thorough precision diagnosis prior to any procedure to determine if whitening is the optimal solution for you.

items.question:
Will my teeth be 
very sensitive during the procedure?
items.answer: While individual sensitivity varies, Blanche meticulously applies a gum barrier and adjusts the agent concentration and duration based on your specific sensitivity level. Maximizing your results while minimizing discomfort is the core philosophy behind a Blanche whitening treatment.

price.description: 블랑쉬치과에서 제공하는 비급여 진료 항목 및 수가 안내입니다.

metadata.title: 비급여 수가표 | 블랑쉬치과의원 - 강남치과, 논현역치과, 무삭제 라미네이트
metadata.description: 블랑쉬치과 비급여 수가표 안내! 임플란트, 원데이 무삭제 라미네이트 등 투명한 가격을 확인하세요 강남 주말 및 야간진료가 가능합니다

privacy.title: 개인정보 처리방침
privacy.description: 블랑쉬치과 개인정보 처리방침입니다. 수집 항목과 이용 목적, 보유 기간 등을 명확히 공지합니다. 안전한 서비스를 위해 규정된 내용을 확인해 보세요
